text.title: Embedding Applications Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules + 2 terminal conclusions every embedding-pipeline config must enforce.

rule.statement: MTEB scores are a starting point only. Custom benchmark on 50–200 labeled domain pairs MUST run before promotion. Check task-specific (retrieval) MTEB score, not aggregate rank.
rule.rationale: MTEB aggregates 56 tasks; a #1-overall model may rank #20 on retrieval.

rule.statement: Recall@10 is the primary quality metric; MRR + Precision@K secondary. Bench speed with batch_size 32–128, not single texts.
rule.rationale: Recall@10 = "did the agent find the right source?"; single-text latency misleads by 5–20x.

rule.statement: Vector insertion uses batch APIs (100–500 docs/batch) AND normalized vectors when cosine metric used. Model name + version stored in collection metadata.
rule.rationale: Single inserts 10–50x slower; unnormalized vectors give wrong cosine rankings; missing metadata blocks re-indexing decisions.

rule.statement: Parent agent gates promotion on Recall@10 > threshold (default 0.7). Sub-threshold candidate blocked; no override.
rule.rationale: Quality gates prevent bad models from reaching production.

rule.statement: OpenAI batch ≤ 2048 + exponential backoff. Cohere includes `input_type` per call. Voyage for code/multilingual. Local models only if GPU + latency budget.
rule.rationale: Rate-limit policies + input_type are free 5–15% quality boosts.

rule.statement: Collection dimension + metric pinned at creation; never changed without re-indexing. pgvector `<=>` requires `vector_cosine_ops` index.
rule.rationale: Schema changes after ingestion produce silent correctness bugs.

rule.statement: Each vector carries `model_name` + `model_version` + `created_at` metadata. Collection-level metadata alone insufficient.
rule.rationale: Per-vector metadata lets partial re-embedding (only affected vectors) when provider deprecates.

rule.statement: New RAG project OR migration AND ≥50 labeled domain pairs available → run the 5-step procedure.
General-purpose corpus well-served by ada-002 baseline OR <50 labeled pairs → skip; use prior-art recommendation.
